title: dysoxylum becklerianum
intro: Dysoxylum becklerianum, also known as the 'Black Ironwood', is a tropical tree native to the Philippines and is a member of the family Meliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include analgesic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Dysoxylum becklerianum include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as an antiseptic and an anti-inflammatory agent. The plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, such as a tea, a tincture, and an infusion, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
